mission.title: Install and Configure Bfe on Kubernetes
mission.description: BFE is a modern layer 7 load balancer from Baidu, designed for efficient traffic management and routing. Installing BFE allows you to leverage its capabilities for load balancing and traffic management in your Kubernetes environment.

steps.title: Run BFE with Docker
steps.description:
Start BFE using the official Docker image:
```bash
docker pull bfenetworks/bfe:v1.6.0
docker run -d --name bfe -p 8080:8080 -p 8443:8443 -p 8421:8421 bfenetworks/bfe:v1.6.0
```

steps.title: Deploy BFE on Kubernetes
steps.description:
Deploy BFE as a Kubernetes Ingress controller:
```bash
kubectl create namespace bfe-system
kubectl apply -n bfe-system -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: bfe
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: bfe
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: bfe
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: bfe
        image: bfenetworks/bfe:v1.6.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        - containerPort: 8443
        - containerPort: 8421
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: bfe
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: bfe
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
  - name: https
    port: 8443
  - name: monitor
    port: 8421
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
# Docker
curl http://localhost:8421/monitor

# Kubernetes
kubectl get pods -n bfe-system
kubectl port-forward svc/bfe -n bfe-system 8421:8421
curl http://localhost:8421/monitor
```

uninstall.title: Remove BFE
uninstall.description:
```bash
docker stop bfe && docker rm bfe
# Or:
kubectl delete namespace bfe-system
```

upgrade.title: Update image
upgrade.description:
```bash
docker pull bfenetworks/bfe:v1.6.0
# Or:
kubectl set image deployment/bfe bfe=bfenetworks/bfe:v1.6.0 -n bfe-system
```

troubleshooting.title: BFE not responding
troubleshooting.description:
Check logs:
```bash
docker logs bfe
# Or:
kubectl logs -l app=bfe -n bfe-system
```

troubleshooting.title: Configuration errors
troubleshooting.description: BFE config files are in `/home/work/bfe/conf/`. Mount custom configs via volumes.

troubleshooting.title: Monitor page not accessible
troubleshooting.description:
The monitor interface runs on port 8421:
```bash
curl http://localhost:8421/monitor
```

resolution.summary: BFE load balancer is running and accessible with the monitoring interface on port 8421.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and the necessary tools installed.
